column1: This workbook has 3 worksheets, including this Instructions page and a data table worksheet on tab 2. Notes and sources can be found after the table in column A. Contact information can be found on tab 3.

Instructions
The following Unicode symbols are used in this workbook (these symbols may need to be enabled if using screen reading software):
em dash (—) 
en dash (–)
asterisk (*)

The Patient Cost Estimator (PCE) is a tool developed by CIHI to estimate the average cost of various services provided in hospitals. This tool provides information nationally, by jurisdiction and by patient age group. The cost estimates represent the estimated average cost of services provided to the average typical inpatient in an acute care facility. They include the costs incurred by the hospital in providing services.
Unless otherwise indicated, this product uses data provided by Canada’s provinces and territories.
